title: CDNPerspective 3D
description: Allows for moving the camera 360 Degrees without changing movement-direction.
body:
**NOTE: THIS MOD NOW (1.2+) REQUIRES FABRIC-API FOR 1.19.3+ ON BOTH SERVER & CLIENT.** This Mod allows you to change the Camera-Position while running around, allowing for advanced looking around, while keeping the movement-direction. ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chloecdn/cdn-perspective-3d/master/sample.png) **What this Mod does:** - Client: When installed on the Client, you can press a hotkey (F4 by default) to enter perspective-mode. while in this mode, you can use your mouse to look around. This will not affect your movement-direction, only the camera-direction. when you press the hotkey again, you leave perspective-mode, and will be set to the previous Perspective again. - Server: When installed on a Server, This essentially disables the use of this mod on your server.
How this works?
Once a player joins, this mod will send a packet to that player's client. If the player doesn't have this mod, the packet will just be ignored. if it has it installed, it will react to the packet, and disable all of it's Features.
**NOTE: THIS IS NOT A RELIABLE ANTICHEAT. Java as a language is pretty vulnerable to reverse-engineering, which means technically everyone can just take the source-code, remove these functionalities, and circumvent that system. The mod beeing open source on GitHub is also a thing. I only provide this because this CAN be considered a Cheat.** As always, if you find any Bugs, you can always report them on my GitHub (Left Sidebar, click `Issues`) Also as always, you can Support me with an optional donation on [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/chloecdn/).
